task: FH-4 Finance Calculator (Tier 3). PURE modeling-only: monthly payment, total interest, payoff date, amortization preview, and side-by-side scenario compare. Reuses FH-2 loan-math. Writes NOTHING and never posts — no DB writes at all. Thin pure compute endpoint POST /api/v1/finance/calculator/compute, gated behind FINANCE_HUB_CALCULATOR_ENABLED (migration 202606160200 registers it default OFF): route 404s when OFF; frontend tab/page hidden when OFF (route registered in the hidden finance submenu for nav-integrity; visible nav byte-identical; preview tables wrapped in overflow-x-auto for the mobile audit). 'Use these -> create loan' links to FH-2. Boundary enforced by scripts/verify-fh4-no-posting.mjs (fails on posting_batches / journal_entry_postings / writes to accounting|finance.* / posting engine). Pure unit tests prove payment/interest/payoff + scenario compare (shorter term = higher payment, less total interest) + 0% case + down>=price rejection. Additive-only; posting engine / EXPENSE_GL_POSTING_ENABLED untouched. Ship on green, Jorge merges.
